sub_modules.gaussian3x3_blur: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian stencil with 1-2-1 kernel normalization by 16.
sub_modules.unsharp_difference: Combinational signed pointwise high-frequency difference original minus blurred.
sub_modules.unsharp_gain: Combinational signed pointwise multiplication of the high-frequency term by gain.
sub_modules.unsharp_reconstruct: Combinational signed reconstruction and saturation to the output pixel range.
